title: pelargonium × biflorum
intro: Pelargonium × biflorum, also known as Vanishing Rose, is a hybrid species of the Geranium plant family. It is native to South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × biflorum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other illnesses. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and ease stress.
